research_question: Under the frozen v18 operational contract, which of four consolidated Alpha158 exact keepers corr20, cord30, vma60, and vsumd60 appear compositionally compatible enough with the current core two-signal family to justify a later restrained overlay or family round?

reference_core_family_contract.reference_score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC)); require min_feature_count >= 2
reference_core_family_contract.reference_portfolio_contract: Freeze the full v18 operational contract, including the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, TopK=10 width, current head extraction, and top-15 refresh hysteresis. This round does not run a new full chain and does not change any live portfolio rule.

screening_contract.tentative_screen_score_rule: For each screened signal independently: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5_raw DESC), percentile_rank(liquidity_trend_20_60_raw DESC), percentile_rank(signal direction-aware)); require min_feature_count >= 3
pairwise_component_checks: momentum_60_5_raw vs screened signal rank correlation
liquidity_trend_20_60_raw vs screened signal rank correlation
core_v18_score vs screened signal interaction bucket monotonicity

hard_gate.rule: screen_avg_top10_overlap_next_day must not be lower than reference_avg_top10_overlap_next_day by more than 0.2

disallowed_changes: Do not open a live family round inside this screen.
Do not run a new full chain or fixed test inside this round.
Do not change score family weights in the live contract.
Do not change the 0.70 ranking liquidity guard.
Do not change execution semantics, benchmark, or cost contracts.
decision_rule: If a screened Alpha158 keeper shows clean additive or at least non-destructive interaction with the v18 core family, preserves or improves static head-slice quality, and does not violate the next-day top10 overlap hard gate or materially worsen liquidity proxies, it may advance into a later restrained overlay or family-construction round. Otherwise it should remain a standalone keeper only.
notes: This round operationalizes the post-Alpha158 exact 158 consolidation decision: do composability screening before any new family reopening.
Only four consolidated primary-pool keepers are screened in this round: corr20, cord30, vma60, and vsumd60.
The overlap hard gate is now explicit and binding in this preregistration.
